title: Version
description: Versioning refers to saving new copies of your files when you make changes so that you can go back and retrieve specific versions of your files later.

definitions.definition: Versioning refers to saving new copies of your files when you make changes so that you can go back and retrieve specific versions of your files later.
definitions.notes: Best practices is to record a version in the metadata. The version is increased when there is a modification to the scientific algorithm used to process the data.
definitions.sources:
- [Stanford University Data Management Services](https://library.stanford.edu/research/data-management-services/data-best-practices/data-versioning)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
